🌍 Beyond recognition: What the Green Dream Award means for sustainable beauty

Winning the Green Dream Award at Making Cosmetics 2025 isn’t just about innovation—it’s about impact.

ECOHANCE® Soft Baobab was selected for its ability to combine:
✔ Eco-compatibility: responsibly sourced from West Africa near the Sahel
✔ Social empowerment: creating income opportunities for local communities, especially women
✔ Performance excellence: premium emollient with soothing, repairing efficacy and superior sensory feel

This award validates our mission to make sustainability measurable and meaningful in personal care.

👉 Learn more about ECOHANCE® Soft Baobab and its story on evonik.com

evonikpc
🧪 Exfoliating Foamy Cleansing Cream

Looking for a sulfate-free cleansing solution that delivers more than just clean skin?
Our Exfoliating Foamy Cleansing Cream offers:

✔ Structured surfactant system - sulfate-free and designed to stabilize scrub particles while enabling high oil levels.
✔ Dual exfoliation - powered by Novascrub® Arroz (INCI: Oryza Sativa Powder; Actinidia Chinensis Fruit Extract), a natural exfoliating ingredient that fuses rice and kiwi fruit for effective chemical and physical exfoliation.
✔ Surprising foaming properties in a creamy texture for a sensorial experience.
✔ Effective make-up removal - even waterproof formulations.

Formulated with ECOHANCE® Remo XP (INCI: Sorbityl/Xylityl Pelargonate), an enzymatically produced hydrophobic rheology modifier, this concept is perfect for next-generation facial cleansers.

👉 Interested in creating your own exfoliating cleanser? Let’s talk formulations!

Oleobiota®: A symbol of natural beauty powered by science, rooted in sustainability, and driven by the richness of local biodiversity to deliver globally innovative skincare.

🌿 Sourced from sustainably grown Ñangapirí leaves in the Misiones rainforest of Argentina. It’s developed under the Nagoya Protocol ensuring an ethical and traceable supply chain committed to biodiversity and social inclusion.

🧪 Designed for combination to oily skin, Oleobiota® delivers visible results: mattifying effect, sebum regulation, and refined pores. An effective and conscious solution for minimalist routines focused on skin balance.

evonikpc
🧴 Facial Cleansing: What Consumers Expect - and What Brands Need to Deliver
In today’s facial cleansing market, mildness and efficacy are non-negotiable.

🔹 69% of German women say gentle beauty products are essential to their routines.*
Why? Facial skin - especially around the eyes and cheeks - is thinner and more sensitive, making it prone to irritation during cleansing.
🔹 At the same time, consumers expect effective make-up removal, even for waterproof products.
🔹 And they’re open to new formats: alongside foams and micellar waters, milky toners and other innovative textures are gaining shelf space.

For formulators and brands, this means rethinking cleansing solutions that are gentle, high-performing, and sensorially appealing.

→ Let’s shape the next generation of facial cleansing together.
*Source: Mintel – The Future of Skincare: Facial Cleansing 2025

#Evonik #PersonalCare #FaceCleansing #SkinCare #RedefiningClean

🔬✨ 클렌징 폼의 새로운 도전

순함과 성능을 한 번에 해결하는 스마트한 2중 제형으로 젠틀밀크탑 바이파식 클렌징폼을 인사하세요.

무엇이 특별하지?

✅ 신경쓰이는 밀키 레이어와 클렌징 서펙트 단계를 결합한 2-in-1 포맷
✅설페이트- 그리고 PEG 프리
✅기분좋은 감각효과의 크리미한 거품
✅ RHEANCE® D50 (INCI: Glycolipids)에서 제공 - 매우 순한 세척을 위한 자연 유래 글리콜리피드
✅ TEGOSOFT® BC MB (INCI: Butylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate)로 향상 - 효율적인 메이크업을 지우기 위한 좋은 피그먼트 웨팅 특성을 가진 고순도 왁스 에스터

2025 메이킹 화장품에서 그린 드림 어워드 수상은 단순히 혁신에 관한 것이 아닙니다. 영향에 관한 것입니다.

✔ 성능 우수: 진정, 수리 효율 및 감각적인 느낌을 갖춘 프리미엄 에몰리언트

이 상은 지속 가능성을 측정 가능하고 개인적인 관리에서 의미 있게 만들기 위한 우리의 임무를 확인합니다.

🧪 각질제거 포미 클렌징 크림

깨끗한 피부를 넘어 전달하는 설페이트 프리 클렌징 솔루션을 찾고 계신가요?
우리의 각질제거 폼 클렌징 크림 제공:

✔ 구조화된 서팩트 시스템 - 황페이트 프리이며 스크럽 입자를 안정화 시키도록 설계되었습니다.
✔ 듀얼 각질제거 - Novascrub® Arroz(INCI: Oryza Sativa Powder; Actinidia Chinensis Fruit Extract)가 공급하여 효과적인 화학적 및 물리적 각질제거를 위해 쌀과 키위열매를 융합한 천연 각질제거 성분인 Actinid
✔ 감각적인 경험을 위한 크리미한 질감에 놀라운 거품 특성
✔ 효과적인 화장 지우기 - 워터프루프 제형까지.

ECOHANCE® Remo XP (INCI: Sorbityl/Xylityl Pelargonate)로 구성된 효소로 생산된 수경공포증 레올로지 모디파이어로 차세대 안면세정제에 완벽한 컨셉입니다.

👉 나만의 각질제거 클렌징 만드는 데 관심이 있으신가요? 공식에 대해 이야기하자!

🧪 각질제거 포미 클렌징 크림

깨끗한 피부를 넘어 전달하는 설페이트 프리 클렌징 솔루션을 찾고 계신가요?
우리의 각질제거 폼 클렌징 크림 제공:

✔ 구조화된 서팩트 시스템 - 황페이트 프리이며 스크럽 입자를 안정화 시키도록 설계되었습니다.
✔ 듀얼 각질제거 - Novascrub® Arroz(INCI: Oryza Sativa Powder; Actinidia Chinensis Fruit Extract)가 공급하여 효과적인 화학적 및 물리적 각질제거를 위해 쌀과 키위열매를 융합한 천연 각질제거 성분인 Actinid
✔ 감각적인 경험을 위한 크리미한 질감에 놀라운 거품 특성
✔ 효과적인 화장 지우기 - 워터프루프 제형까지.

ECOHANCE® Remo XP (INCI: Sorbityl/Xylityl Pelargonate)로 구성된 효소로 생산된 수경공포증 레올로지 모디파이어로 차세대 안면세정제에 완벽한 컨셉입니다.

💧 From Cleansing to Care: The Power of Milky Toners

Did you know milky toners are driving most of the innovation in the lotion and toner category? According to Circana¹, they account for 76% of all new launches. That’s huge!
Why the buzz? Consumers love products that do more than one job.

Our Moisturizing Milky Toner (GM 4/7) hydrates and nourishes the skin while gently removing residual make up and cleansing product traces. It’s the perfect bridge between cleansing and care - ideal for modern routines.
Here’s what makes it special:
✔ TEGOSOFT® BC MB (INCI: Butylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate) - a high-purity wax ester for efficient pigment removal
✔ SKINLIPIX® HydraShield - a unique blend of plant-oil-based ceramides and moisturizers that support the skin barrier

evonikpc
🪽 Silky Sensation powered by Dual Sustainability.

ECOHANCE® Soft BOL is a highly sustainable ester oil delivering exceptional silky sensorial benefits—ideal for skin care, sun care, and color cosmetics.

Why formulators like it:
✨Premium silky skin feel (silkiness shown superior vs silicones and vs natural oils in profiling).
✨Helps minimize “sticky residue effect”, especially relevant in high SPF formats.
✨Good UV filter solubility (comparable to isoamyl esters).
✨Very high pigment wetting/dispersion capability, strong for color cosmetics.
✨Clinically evaluated: moisturizing (+30.3% hydration after 3 weeks in a study) and non-comedogenic conclusion.

Visit the product page ob our website to explore performance details and application inspiration.

#Evonik #PersonalCare #ECOHANCE #FaceCare #BodyCare #emollient #ECOHANCESoftBOL #SustainableBeauty #PersonalCareIngredients #FormulationInnovation #intoBeauty
1일
번역 보기

evonikpc
🤍 Dual sustainability, built into the molecule and the process.

Sustainability isn’t only about “natural origin”. ECOHANCE® Soft BOL is designed around a dual sustainability concept: responsible sourcing + eco-friendly production.

🌿1) Next-generation feedstock (“waste to worth”)
Derived from industrial residues and food waste/side streams - including olive acid oil, and butanol sourced via rejected potatoes and whisky pot ale.

🌿2) Eco-friendly process
Made via low-temperature enzymatic esterification (T < 90°C) and produced with 100% renewable electricity, contributing to a significantly reduced global-warming impact and negative product carbon footprint.

Want to formulate even more environmentally friendly? Then check out our product presentation for the “Double Care Concentrate” moisturizing cream, a concentrate and dilution concept designed with reduced packaging in mind.

👉 Visit the product page to learn more.

📥 And download the complete presentation on intoBeauty® for the full sustainability story + formulations.

evonikpc
🌿 Meet Nature’s Mountain Hero: Sempervivum tectorum

High atop alpine peaks, the often called “Alpine Aloe Vera” thrives where few plants can. Its thick, water storing leaves protect it from icy winds and harsh conditions - making it a powerful symbol of longevity and vitality.

Modern skincare now taps into this resilience. Rich in soothing flavonoids, tannins, and natural moisturizers, Sempervivum tectorum helps calm, hydrate, and support skin regeneration - perfect for sensitive or aging skin.

Grown with care in Switzerland and processed fresh at our site in Sins, our Sempervivum tectorum extracts and juices are COSMOS suitable, making them ideal ingredients for modern, clean beauty formulations.

✨ Resilience is the new radiance.
Discover the alpine plant inspiring next generation clean beauty.

Curious to learn more? Let’s connect!
#PersonalCare #BotanicalActives #Evonik

✨ Introducing SPHINOX® Vively — your new breakthrough in visible skin rejuvenation! ✨

Powered by advanced sphingolipid science, SPHINOX® Vively strengthens the skin barrier, boosts resilience, and unveils a smoother, clearer, more radiant complexion. This caring, anti aging active helps skin return to its youthful look and feel.

Benefits at a glance
• Increases Ceramide levels for skin barrier restoration
• Empowers skin resilience with anti-inflammatory properties
• Balances cell renewal with Retinol-like efficacy
• Boosts firmness & replenishes hydration for skin rejuvenation
• Reduces skin roughness for a smooth & refined look
• Enhances skin luminosity for a radiant complexion
• Refines pores & porphyrins for a clearer skin appearance
